name: Silencer's Song
reqs: silencers_blade => silencers_song := 100r LHT OR 100r MED OR 100r HVY, 100s WND
additional_info: Landing any Mantra on a suffocated target creates a new stack of suffocation that lasts 5 seconds. Additionally, you gain a 22.5% speed boost for 3 seconds.
desc: Silencer's Blade now procs on your mantras.
